description_for_human: Search real estate listings, explore a map of properties, and parse natural-language real estate queries in Czech, Slovak and other languages on Nemovizor.
description_for_model: Use Nemovizor to search Czech, Slovak and European real estate listings via /api/properties, retrieve map points via /api/map-points, fetch faceted filter metadata via /api/filter-options, and convert natural-language user queries into structured filters via /api/ai-search. Combine /api/ai-search output with /api/properties query parameters to answer real estate questions. See OpenAPI spec at /api/openapi for exact contracts.
